requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — RED Art. 3.1(b) / EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17 (Belgium / EU)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容发射 — RED第3.1(b)条 / EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17（比利时/欧盟）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容發射 — RED第3.1(b)條 / EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17（比利時/歐盟）

summary.en: Under RED 2014/53/EU Art. 3.1(b), radio equipment placed on the Belgian (EU) market must not cause harmful interference to other radio services or systems, and must control its own radiated and conducted emissions. The applicable harmonised standard framework is EN 301 489: specifically EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3 (Common technical requirements for electromagnetic compatibility) combined with EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4 (Specific conditions for broadband data transmission systems, covering RLAN/Wi-Fi and Bluetooth). Emission limits trace to CISPR 32:2015 for radiated and conducted disturbance. EN 301 489-17 applies radio-device-specific duty-cycle-adjusted averaging methods and RLAN-specific measurement configurations that are not present in generic IT equipment EMC standards. Compliance with EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17 together grants presumption of conformity with RED Art. 3.1(b). BIPT monitors the Belgian radio frequency environment and enforces compliance through spectrum monitoring and product surveillance. Belgium applies these requirements uniformly with no national derogations from the harmonised EN 301 489 framework.
summary.zh: 依据RED 2014/53/EU第3.1(b)条，投放比利时（欧盟）市场的无线电设备不得对其他无线电业务或系统造成有害干扰，须控制自身的辐射和传导骚扰。适用的协调标准体系为EN 301 489：具体为EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3（电磁兼容通用技术要求）结合EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4（宽带数据传输系统特定条件，涵盖RLAN/Wi-Fi和蓝牙）。发射限值依据CISPR 32:2015对辐射和传导骚扰进行规定。EN 301 489-17采用了通用IT设备电磁兼容标准所不具备的无线设备特定占空比调整平均方法及RLAN特定测量配置。同时符合EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17可推定符合RED第3.1(b)条。BIPT监测比利时无线电频率环境，并通过频谱监测和产品抽查执行合规。比利时无国家豁免，与协调EN 301 489标准框架统一适用。
summary.zht: 依據RED 2014/53/EU第3.1(b)條，投放比利時（歐盟）市場的無線電設備不得對其他無線電業務或系統造成有害干擾，須控制自身的輻射和傳導騷擾。適用的協調標準體系為EN 301 489：具體為EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3（電磁相容通用技術要求）結合EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4（寬頻數據傳輸系統特定條件，涵蓋RLAN/Wi-Fi和藍牙）。發射限值依據CISPR 32:2015對輻射和傳導騷擾進行規定。EN 301 489-17採用了通用IT設備電磁相容標準所不具備的無線設備特定佔空比調整平均方法及RLAN特定測量配置。同時符合EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17可推定符合RED第3.1(b)條。BIPT監測比利時無線電頻率環境，並通過頻譜監測和產品抽查執行合規。比利時無國家豁免，與協調EN 301 489標準框架統一適用。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/53/EU (RED), Art. 3.1(b) — electromagnetic compatibility (emissions control and spectrum protection)
EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3 — Electromagnetic compatibility and radio spectrum matters; Part 1: Common technical requirements
EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4 — Specific conditions for broadband data transmission systems (RLAN / Bluetooth)
CISPR 32:2015 — Multimedia equipment; electromagnetic disturbance characteristics (referenced by EN 301 489-1)

summary.en: In China, EMC emissions for wireless and IT equipment are governed by GB/T 9254.1-2021 (Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — limits and methods of measurement, equivalent to CISPR 32:2015), administered by SAMR/SAC. For products subject to CCC, EMC testing must be conducted at a CNCA-designated laboratory. While GB/T 9254.1-2021 emission limits are broadly equivalent to CISPR 32 (and therefore broadly comparable to EN 301 489-1), the Chinese framework does not include the radio-device-specific test modes of EN 301 489-17 (duty-cycle adjustment for RLAN transmitters, RLAN-specific test patterns). Chinese test reports issued against GB/T 9254.1 are therefore not accepted as EU RED EMC compliance evidence.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线和IT设备的电磁兼容发射要求由GB/T 9254.1-2021（信息技术设备——无线电骚扰特性——限值和测量方法，等同于CISPR 32:2015）管理，由市场监管总局/国家标准化管理委员会负责执行。对于须进行CCC认证的产品，电磁兼容检测须在CNCA指定实验室进行。尽管GB/T 9254.1-2021的发射限值与CISPR 32大体相当（因而与EN 301 489-1大体可比），但中国标准框架不包含EN 301 489-17的无线设备特定测试模式（RLAN发射器的占空比调整、RLAN特定测试规程）。因此，依据GB/T 9254.1出具的中国检测报告不被接受为欧盟RED电磁兼容合规证明。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線和IT設備的電磁相容發射要求由GB/T 9254.1-2021（信息技術設備——無線電騷擾特性——限值和測量方法，等同於CISPR 32:2015）管理，由市場監管總局/國家標準化管理委員會負責執行。對於須進行CCC認證的產品，電磁相容檢測須在CNCA指定實驗室進行。儘管GB/T 9254.1-2021的發射限值與CISPR 32大體相當（因而與EN 301 489-1大體可比），但中國標準框架不包含EN 301 489-17的無線設備特定測試模式（RLAN發射器的佔空比調整、RLAN特定測試規程）。因此，依據GB/T 9254.1出具的中國檢測報告不被接受為歐盟RED電磁相容合規證明。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment; radio disturbance characteristics; limits and methods of measurement (equivalent to CISPR 32:2015) (SAMR/SAC)
GB 9254-2008 — prior version (superseded; cited in older CCC test reports)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 9254.1 EMC emission test reports cannot substitute for EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17 testing because: (1) EN 301 489-17 specifies RLAN-specific duty-cycle-adjusted emission averaging and measurement configurations absent from GB/T 9254.1; (2) EU conformity assessment under RED requires the test report to explicitly reference the harmonised EN, not the Chinese GB equivalent; (3) measurement configurations (antenna setup, operating mode, duty cycle) may differ, affecting the comparability of results. Fresh emissions testing at an ILAC MRA-member or EU-accredited laboratory to EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3 + EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4 is required for CE marking. No Belgium-specific derogation applies — EN 301 489 applies uniformly across the EU. BIPT enforces EMC compliance as part of its radio frequency environment monitoring mandate.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 9254.1电磁兼容发射检测报告不能替代EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17检测，原因如下：（1）EN 301 489-17规定了GB/T 9254.1所不具备的RLAN特定占空比调整发射平均及测量配置；（2）RED下的欧盟合格评定要求检测报告明确引用协调EN标准，而非中国GB等效标准；（3）测量配置（天线布置、工作模式、占空比）可能有所不同，影响结果的可比性。取得CE标志须在ILAC MRA成员或欧盟认可实验室按EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3 + EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4重新进行发射检测。比利时无特殊豁免——EN 301 489在全欧盟统一适用。BIPT作为无线电频率环境监测机构负责执行电磁兼容合规。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 9254.1電磁相容發射檢測報告不能取代EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17檢測，原因如下：（1）EN 301 489-17規定了GB/T 9254.1所不具備的RLAN特定佔空比調整發射平均及測量配置；（2）RED下的歐盟合格評定要求檢測報告明確引用協調EN標準，而非中國GB等效標準；（3）測量配置（天線布置、工作模式、佔空比）可能有所不同，影響結果的可比性。取得CE標誌須在ILAC MRA成員或歐盟認可實驗室按EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3 + EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4重新進行發射檢測。比利時無特殊豁免——EN 301 489在全歐盟統一適用。BIPT作為無線電頻率環境監測機構負責執行電磁相容合規。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RED 2014/53/EU Art. 3.1(b); covered under CE marking; EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17 are the harmonised standards for RLAN/Bluetooth; no Belgium-specific derogation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for CCC-listed products (CNCA-C17-01); GB/T 9254.1-2021 under SAMR/SAC framework; does not satisfy EU RED pathway

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RED Art. 3.1(b) EMC emissions compliance for Wi-Fi/Bluetooth devices entering Belgium requires EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17 testing at an EU-accredited laboratory. Chinese GB/T 9254.1 reports are not accepted. No Belgium-specific derogation; EU harmonised standards apply uniformly. BIPT monitors the radio frequency environment and may test products at import or retail.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入比利时的Wi-Fi/蓝牙设备的RED第3.1(b)条电磁兼容发射合规要求在欧盟认可实验室进行EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17检测。中国GB/T 9254.1报告不被接受。比利时无特殊豁免；协调EN标准在欧盟统一适用。BIPT负责监测无线电频率环境，并可在进口或零售环节对产品进行检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入比利時的Wi-Fi/藍牙設備的RED第3.1(b)條電磁相容發射合規要求在歐盟認可實驗室進行EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17檢測。中國GB/T 9254.1報告不被接受。比利時無特殊豁免；協調EN標準在歐盟統一適用。BIPT負責監測無線電頻率環境，並可在進口或零售環節對產品進行檢測。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity — RED Art. 3.1(b) / EN 301 489 Immunity Requirements (Belgium / EU)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容抗扰度 — RED第3.1(b)条 / EN 301 489抗扰度要求（比利时/欧盟）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容抗擾度 — RED第3.1(b)條 / EN 301 489抗擾度要求（比利時/歐盟）

summary.en: RED 2014/53/EU Art. 3.1(b) also requires radio equipment to have an adequate level of immunity to electromagnetic disturbances, ensuring normal operation when exposed to typical electromagnetic environments. For Wi-Fi/Bluetooth devices, immunity compliance is demonstrated via EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3 (incorporating relevant IEC 61000-4 series tests) and EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4 (RLAN/Bluetooth-specific immunity performance criteria). Key IEC 61000-4 immunity tests include: EFT/Burst (IEC 61000-4-4), surge (IEC 61000-4-5), conducted disturbance (IEC 61000-4-6), and radiated immunity (IEC 61000-4-3). EN 301 489-17 specifies performance criteria for RLAN operation under these disturbances. Belgium applies the same harmonised immunity standards as the rest of the EU; there are no national derogations for immunity testing. Belgium's high density of connected devices in both residential and professional/EU-institutional environments (Brussels) makes immunity performance particularly relevant.
summary.zh: RED 2014/53/EU第3.1(b)条还要求无线电设备对电磁骚扰具有充分的抗扰度，确保在典型电磁环境下正常运行。对于Wi-Fi/蓝牙设备，抗扰度合规通过EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3（纳入相关IEC 61000-4系列测试）和EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4（RLAN/蓝牙特定抗扰度性能判据）来证明。主要IEC 61000-4抗扰度测试包括：电快速瞬变/脉冲群（IEC 61000-4-4）、浪涌（IEC 61000-4-5）、传导骚扰（IEC 61000-4-6）及辐射抗扰度（IEC 61000-4-3）。EN 301 489-17规定了RLAN设备在上述骚扰下的性能判据。比利时与欧盟其他地区适用相同的协调抗扰度标准；抗扰度测试无国家豁免。比利时住宅及专业/欧盟机构（布鲁塞尔）环境中联网设备高度密集，使抗扰度性能尤为重要。
summary.zht: RED 2014/53/EU第3.1(b)條還要求無線電設備對電磁騷擾具有充分的抗擾度，確保在典型電磁環境下正常運行。對於Wi-Fi/藍牙設備，抗擾度合規通過EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3（納入相關IEC 61000-4系列測試）和EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4（RLAN/藍牙特定抗擾度性能判據）來證明。主要IEC 61000-4抗擾度測試包括：電快速瞬變/脈衝群（IEC 61000-4-4）、浪湧（IEC 61000-4-5）、傳導騷擾（IEC 61000-4-6）及輻射抗擾度（IEC 61000-4-3）。EN 301 489-17規定了RLAN設備在上述騷擾下的性能判據。比利時與歐盟其他地區適用相同的協調抗擾度標準；抗擾度測試無國家豁免。比利時住宅及專業/歐盟機構（布魯塞爾）環境中聯網設備高度密集，使抗擾度性能尤為重要。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/53/EU (RED), Art. 3.1(b) — immunity to electromagnetic disturbances
EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3 — Common technical requirements (including IEC 61000-4 series immunity levels and test methods)
EN 301 489-17 v3.2.4 — Specific conditions for broadband data transmission systems (RLAN/Bluetooth performance criteria under disturbances)
IEC 61000-4-3 — Radiated, radio-frequency, electromagnetic field immunity test
IEC 61000-4-4 — Electrical fast transient / burst immunity test
IEC 61000-4-6 — Immunity to conducted disturbances, induced by radio-frequency fields

summary.en: In China, electromagnetic immunity for IT/wireless equipment is covered by GB/T 17618-2015 (Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics — limits and methods of measurement, equivalent to CISPR 24:2010). For CCC-listed IT products, immunity testing is conducted at CNCA-designated laboratories. GB/T 17618 specifies immunity levels broadly aligned with IEC 61000-4 series, but does not include RLAN-specific performance criteria equivalent to EN 301 489-17. Additionally, some immunity severity levels in GB/T 17618 may differ from those specified in EN 301 489-1 for the EU market. Chinese immunity test reports under GB/T 17618 are not accepted as evidence of RED Art. 3.1(b) immunity compliance.
summary.zh: 在中国，IT/无线设备的电磁抗扰度要求由GB/T 17618-2015（信息技术设备——抗扰度特性——限值和测量方法，等同于CISPR 24:2010）管理。对于须进行CCC认证的IT产品，抗扰度检测须在CNCA指定实验室进行。GB/T 17618规定的抗扰度等级与IEC 61000-4系列大体一致，但不包含与EN 301 489-17等效的RLAN特定性能判据。此外，GB/T 17618中部分抗扰度严酷等级可能与欧盟市场EN 301 489-1规定的有所不同。依据GB/T 17618出具的中国抗扰度检测报告不被接受为RED第3.1(b)条抗扰度合规证明。
summary.zht: 在中國，IT/無線設備的電磁抗擾度要求由GB/T 17618-2015（信息技術設備——抗擾度特性——限值和測量方法，等同於CISPR 24:2010）管理。對於須進行CCC認證的IT產品，抗擾度檢測須在CNCA指定實驗室進行。GB/T 17618規定的抗擾度等級與IEC 61000-4系列大體一致，但不包含與EN 301 489-17等效的RLAN特定性能判據。此外，GB/T 17618中部分抗擾度嚴酷等級可能與歐盟市場EN 301 489-1規定的有所不同。依據GB/T 17618出具的中國抗擾度檢測報告不被接受為RED第3.1(b)條抗擾度合規證明。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17618-2015 — Information technology equipment; immunity characteristics; limits and methods of measurement (equivalent to CISPR 24:2010) (SAMR/SAC)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 17618 immunity test reports cannot substitute for EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17 immunity testing because: (1) EN 301 489-17 specifies RLAN-specific performance criteria (pass/fail during and after disturbance) absent from GB/T 17618; (2) the IEC 61000-4 severity levels selected by EN 301 489-1 for the EU market may differ from those used in Chinese testing; (3) EU RED conformity requires the immunity test report to reference the harmonised EN, not the Chinese equivalent. Fresh immunity testing at an EU-accredited laboratory is required. No Belgium-specific immunity derogation exists.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 17618抗扰度检测报告不能替代EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17抗扰度检测，原因如下：（1）EN 301 489-17规定了GB/T 17618所不具备的RLAN特定性能判据（骚扰期间及之后的合格/不合格判定）；（2）EN 301 489-1为欧盟市场选定的IEC 61000-4严酷等级可能与中国检测中采用的有所不同；（3）欧盟RED合规要求抗扰度检测报告引用协调EN标准，而非中国等效标准。须在欧盟认可实验室重新进行抗扰度检测。比利时无抗扰度特殊豁免。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 17618抗擾度檢測報告不能取代EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17抗擾度檢測，原因如下：（1）EN 301 489-17規定了GB/T 17618所不具備的RLAN特定性能判據（騷擾期間及之後的合格/不合格判定）；（2）EN 301 489-1為歐盟市場選定的IEC 61000-4嚴酷等級可能與中國檢測中採用的有所不同；（3）歐盟RED合規要求抗擾度檢測報告引用協調EN標準，而非中國等效標準。須在歐盟認可實驗室重新進行抗擾度檢測。比利時無抗擾度特殊豁免。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RED 2014/53/EU Art. 3.1(b) immunity; EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17 are the harmonised standards; no Belgium-specific derogation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for CCC-listed IT products — GB/T 17618-2015 under SAMR/SAC; does not satisfy EU RED pathway

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RED Art. 3.1(b) immunity compliance for Wi-Fi/Bluetooth devices in Belgium requires EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17 testing. Chinese GB/T 17618 immunity reports are not accepted. RLAN-specific performance criteria under EN 301 489-17 must be met. EU-accredited laboratory re-testing is required for CE marking.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在比利时的Wi-Fi/蓝牙设备RED第3.1(b)条抗扰度合规要求进行EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17检测。中国GB/T 17618抗扰度报告不被接受。须满足EN 301 489-17规定的RLAN特定性能判据。取得CE标志须在欧盟认可实验室重新进行检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在比利時的Wi-Fi/藍牙設備RED第3.1(b)條抗擾度合規要求進行EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17檢測。中國GB/T 17618抗擾度報告不被接受。須滿足EN 301 489-17規定的RLAN特定性能判據。取得CE標誌須在歐盟認可實驗室重新進行檢測。
